and all Acts supplementary to and amendatory of said Acts are made applicable to and extended over the lands hereby added to the park:
, That the provisions of the Federal Power Act [
et seq.] shall not apply to or extend over such lands.

children.text: The Federal Power Act, referred to in text, was in the original the “Act of
